(2009d). The main reasons include: (1) the source categories in this study are more detailed, and random errors are thus significantly reduced due to the \\\"compensation-of-error\\\" mechanism (the same statistical mechanism described for the power sector comparison in Sect. 4.4); and (2) emission factors are\", \"Abstract. The uncertainties of a national, bottom-up inventory of Chinese emissions of anthropogenic  $\\\\mathrm{SO}_2$ ,  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}}$ , and particulate matter (PM) of different size classes and carbonaceous species are comprehensively quantified, for the first time, using Monte Carlo simulation. The inventory is structured by seven dominant sectors: coal-fired electric power, cement, iron and steel, other industry (boiler combustion), other industry (non-combustion processes), transportation, and residential. For each parameter related to emission factors or activity-level calculations, the uncertainties, represented as probability distributions, are either statistically fitted using results of domestic field tests or, when these are lacking, estimated based on foreign or other domestic data. The uncertainties (i.e.,  $95\\\\%$  confidence intervals around the central estimates) of Chinese emissions of  $\\\\mathrm{SO}_2$ ,  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}}$ , total PM,  $\\\\mathrm{PM}_{10}$ ,  $\\\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$ , black carbon (BC), and organic carbon (OC) in 2005 are estimated to be  $-14\\\\% \\\\sim 13\\\\%$ ,  $-13\\\\% \\\\sim 37\\\\%$ ,  $-11\\\\% \\\\sim 38\\\\%$ ,  $-14\\\\% \\\\sim 45\\\\%$ ,  $-17\\\\% \\\\sim 54\\\\%$ ,  $-25\\\\% \\\\sim 136\\\\%$ , and  $-40\\\\% \\\\sim 121\\\\%$ , respectively. Variations at activity levels (e.g., energy consumption or industrial production) are not the main source of emission uncertainties. Due to narrow classification of source types, large sample sizes, and relatively high data quality, the coal-fired power sector is estimated to have the smallest emission uncertainties for all species except BC and OC. Due to poorer source classifications and a wider range of estimated emission factors, considerable uncertainties of  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}}$  and PM emissions from cement production and boiler combustion in other industries are found. The probability distributions of emission factors for biomass burning, the largest source of BC and OC, are fitted based on very limited domestic field measurements, and special caution should thus be taken interpreting\", \"Uncertainties introduced by energy statistics and applications of non-Chinese emission factors have been estimated in previous Chinese emission inventory studies. Streets et al. (2003) applied expert judgment, in which the coefficients of variation (i.e., standard deviation divided by the mean) of the activity levels were assumed based on measures of economic development and perceived statistical quality, and those of emission factors were based on the reliability ratings of U.S. emission factors (USEPA, 2002). They estimated that the uncertainties of Chinese emissions varied from  $-12\\\\% \\\\sim 13\\\\%$  for  $\\\\mathrm{SO}_2$  to  $-83\\\\% \\\\sim 495\\\\%$  for organic carbon (expressed as the lower and upper bounds of a  $95\\\\%$  confidence interval, CI, around a central estimate). To investigate discrepancies in the trends of bottom-up  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}}$  emissions and of the  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_2$  column by satellite, Zhang et al. (2007a) set alternative emission scenarios in which energy statistics from different sources and emission factors with different control levels were applied. They concluded that  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}}$  emissions in east-central China in 2004 could range from 7.9 to  $9.3\\\\mathrm{Tg}$ , and the annual growth rate of emissions from 1995 to 2004 could range from  $5.5\\\\%$  to  $7.1\\\\%$ . Other studies conducted preliminary uncertainty analysis of certain species or sectors in China using statistical methods. Bond et al. (2004) assumed that most emission factors of particulate matter (PM) followed lognormal distributions (with the exception of those of diesel vehicles, which had a gamma distribution) and evaluated the uncertainties of global black carbon (BC) and organic carbon (OC) emissions. The  $95\\\\%$  CIs for Chinese emissions were estimated to be  $-37\\\\% \\\\sim 147\\\\%$  and  $-44\\\\% \\\\sim 104\\\\%$ , respectively. Wu et al. (2010) focused on\", \"In this study, therefore, the uncertainties (expressed as the  $95\\\\%$  CI around the central estimate) of a bottom-up emission inventory in China is evaluated with Monte Carlo simulations, combining comprehensive field measurements of domestic emission factors and investigations of activity levels. The species include  $\\\\mathrm{SO}_2$ ,  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}}$ , total PM,  $\\\\mathrm{PM}_{10}$ ,  $\\\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$ , BC, and OC. The target year is 2005 because it has the most available data. Determining the probability distributions of all of the related parameters is the main undertaking of this study. Section 2 reviews bottom-up emission inventory methods and analyzes the uncertainties of emission source fractions and corresponding activity levels. Section 3 is a thorough analysis of emission factors by sector and fuel type. Section 4 presents the results and related discussion of emission uncertainties by sector, sensitivity analysis, reliability and limitations of the analysis, and comparisons with other studies. Section 5 summarizes the present study.\", \"Chinese emissions in 2005 with  $95\\\\%$  CIs are shown in Table 1 by sector. To be consistent with previous studies, emissions from industrial boilers, cement plants, iron and steel plants, and other industrial processes are aggregated into a single category of industry emissions (see Table S8 in the Supplement for emissions and uncertainties in these sub-sectors). The uncertainties (expressed as the  $95\\\\%$  CI around the central value) are estimated to be  $-14\\\\% \\\\sim 13\\\\%$ ,  $-13\\\\% \\\\sim 37\\\\%$ ,  $-11\\\\% \\\\sim 38\\\\%$ ,  $-14\\\\% \\\\sim 45\\\\%$ ,  $-17\\\\% \\\\sim 54\\\\%$ ,  $-25\\\\% \\\\sim 136\\\\%$ , and  $-40\\\\% \\\\sim 121\\\\%$  for total emissions of  $\\\\mathrm{SO}_2$ ,  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}}$ , PM,  $\\\\mathrm{PM}_{10}$ ,  $\\\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$ , BC, and OC respectively (see Fig. S2 for the output distributions of those species by Monte Carlo simulation).\", \"the result follow. The PM emission characteristics of residential coal combustion in China were tested by different researchers (Zhang and Smith, 2000; Chen et al., 2005; Zhang et al., 2008b), yielding varied emission factors. Very few estimates of the emission factors of Chinese combustion of biomass can be found, however, except for a series of measurements by Li et al. (2007a, b, 2009b). Those measurements were made in four provinces with different types of biomass. As no other domestic tests are available for direct comparisons, systematic biases in these available measurements cannot be ruled out. In this study, we adopt the results from Li et al. (2007a, b, 2009b) fully, lacking further domestic evidence. Given potential high uncertainties, however, a comparison test is conducted for OC emitted by its leading source, biomass combustion, in which the uncertainties of emission factors obtained from Li et al. (2007a, b, 2009b) are replaced with those of foreign studies (Andreae and Merlet, 2001; Streets et al., 2001; Bond et al., 2004). In this case the  $95\\\\%$  CI of OC emission from biomass combustion changes from  $-58\\\\sim 216\\\\%$  to  $-31\\\\%\\\\sim 311\\\\%$ , suggesting caution in interpretation of results based on limited domestic field measurements (see also the discussion in Sect. 4.3).\", \"The situations for emission factors with higher reliability (i.e., A and B) are more complicated. For coal-fired power plants, the data on which the probability distributions for most parameters are fitted are obtained from both thorough field measurements by the authors and published studies by others (see details in Zhao et al., 2010). These support different emission factors across burner types, fuel qualities, and emission control levels. The uncertainty analysis for this sector are thus the most reliable in this study. Such confidence, however, does not apply to the residential sector, particularly biomass burning, even though the emission factors meet A or B criteria. As discussed in Sect. 4.1, the data on which the distributions are based are limited in number and systematic bias may result in this sector. In other words, the reliability of uncertainty analysis of biomass burning is in fact poor despite the statistical strength of data fitting. Given its high contributions to uncertainties in emission estimates, more field measurements of emissions from biomass burning in China are urgently needed.\", \"Fig. 4. Comparisons of annual emissions for China from different studies. The emissions are for year 2005 unless noted. The range line represents the  $95\\\\%$  CIs around the central estimates of this study.\", \"Although inverse studies that evaluate emission inventories using observations and CTMs have indicated that Chinese  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}}$  emissions may be underestimated by around  $50\\\\%$  (Wang et al., 2004; Ma et al., 2006), the uncertainty estimated in this study is relatively small, ranging only  $-13\\\\% \\\\sim 37\\\\%$ . The difference may result in part from omission in bottom-up inventories of anthropogenic  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}}$  sources of entirely different character, such as microbial decomposition of organic wastes associated with the human-animal food chain and applications of chemical fertilizer (Wang et al., 2004). Moreover, emissions vary considerably across regions of China (Wang et al., 2007; Zhao and Wang, 2009) and seasons (Zhang et al., 2007a), and emission uncertainties differentiated accordingly may be larger than national estimates. In order to compare better emission estimates derived from satellite, aircraft, or surface observations, therefore, further investigation of the uncertainties of bottom-up inventories by regions and seasons is needed. These would require region-specific uncertainty assumptions for emission factors and activity levels, and seasonal distribution parameters.\"], \"chunk_type\": \"figure\"}", "paperid": "paper_019", "type": "picture", "chunkid": "chunk_004636"}
            Content: {"text": "The figure compares emission uncertainties for various species in China across different studies, showing 95% confidence intervals. This figure illustrates the reduced uncertainties in emission estimates for PM species and carbonaceous compounds due to improved categorizations and data quality."}
            

```

## 评估分析
- **高价值结果**: 40 条
- **中等价值结果**: 29 条
- **低价值结果**: 11 条

## 关键洞察
- MIX inventory provides 2010 Asian anthropogenic emissions for 10 species at 0.25x0.25° resolution. Total 2010 emissions estimated: 51.3 Tg SO2, 52.1 Tg NOx, 17.3 Pg CO2. Industrial sector contributes 50% of SO2, Power plants 38% of SO2.
- Study utilized meteorological data from China Meteorological Data Sharing Service System and air pollutant data from National Urban Air Quality Real-time Publishing Platform.
- Study identifies container coating workshops have cancer risks (2.29-5.53 x 10^-6) exceeding safe limits (1.0 x 10^-6). Ethylbenzene and 1,2-dichloropropane are prioritized for removal. Sampling used 3.2-L canisters with Entech instruments at 1.5m height.
- Figure 2 visually outlines the system architecture involving data collection, preprocessing, and CNN-LSTM model training for 31 provincial capitals, achieving an average RMSE of 22.06.
- Pollutant concentrations (CO2, SO2, NOx) increase with tunnel distance, defining a mixing zone (0-600m, slow increase rate 27.6 ppm/km for CO2) and an accumulation zone (600m-exit, rapid increase rate 207 ppm/km for CO2). CO2 ranged from 457 to 823 ppm.

## 任务要求
1. 基于以上信息，生成一个全面、连贯的检索过程总结
2. 总结应包括用户问题、检索策略、检索结果、评估分析和关键洞察
3. 总结应逻辑清晰、重点突出，便于用户快速掌握问答核心
4. 使用自然、流畅的语言，避免过于技术性的表达
5. 总结长度适中，不要过长或过短

# 单一检索策略结果总结任务

你的角色是【总结专家】，需要只针对下面这一条检索策略本身，
对其检索到的内容做一个简洁、聚焦的文字总结。
不要复述整个系统流程，也不要评价其他策略。

## 上下文信息

- 用户原始问题: how to visualize the data of air pollution

- 当前小问题: how to visualize the data of air pollution

## 本次检索策略信息

- 工具名称: strategy_semantic_search

- 检索参数: {'query_intent': 'real-time air quality dashboard web platform interactive visualization tools'}

- 策略设计原因: chunk_004628 展示了车辆排放的空间地图可视化。我认为需要扩展探索实时空气质量仪表板和交互式可视化平台的具体实现方法。

- 结果数量统计: 共找到 10 条结果，其中重复 6 条


## 该策略下的全部检索结果（供你全面总结和评估）

- 结果 1（ID: chunk_001905）：

  - 摘要/内容: (No.KYTZ201731 and KYTZ201814). The meteorological dataset was provided by the China Meteorological Data Sharing Service System (http://cdc.cma.gov.cn). Additionally, the air pollutant data were downloaded from the National Urban Air Quality Real-time Publishing Platform (http://106.37.208.233:20035/). The datasets generated during and/or analyzed in this study are publicly available as referenced within the article. All data and scripts are available from the corresponding author upon request.


- 结果 2（ID: chunk_004609）：

  - 摘要/内容: The figure displays grid maps for gaseous and aerosol species based on the MIX Asian emission inventory in 2010, highlighting spatial emission patterns. The maps illustrate improved spatial emission patterns due to the incorporation of high-resolution datasets, assisting in better understanding and management of emissions across Asia.


- 结果 3（ID: chunk_004695）：

  - 摘要/内容: Visual representation of concentration profiles for multiple pollutants measured at varying distances within a tunnel, showing trends of accumulation and mixing. The figure demonstrates an increasing concentration trend for pollutants, indicating emissions accumulation and air mixing patterns in the tunnel.


- 结果 4（ID: chunk_004468）：

  - 摘要/内容: Figure 3 depicts the procedures of data preprocessing with steps for missing data imputation, outlier treatment, correlation analysis, and standardization. The figure illustrates a comprehensive data preprocessing pipeline essential for preparing accurate input data for predictive modeling in air quality forecasting.

  - 评估动作: KEEP

  - 评估要点: Data preprocessing pipeline employs Lagrange interpolation for missing values, box-plot outlier treatment, and Kendall correlation for feature selection before Z-score normalization.

  - 评估理由: Valuable methodological reference for air quality predictive modeling workflows, though not a direct finding on air quality trends itself.


- 结果 5（ID: chunk_000485）：

  - 摘要/内容: Air quality prediction can be influenced by meteorological conditions, atmospheric dispersion, and geographic characteristics. Therefore, in addition to the air quality data, daily meteorological parameters such as the highest temperature (HT), lowest temperature (LT), wind direction (WD), and wind power (WP) are also considered. The identified parameters are taken as input along with the air quality parameters to encode the spatiotemporal relation, which is extracted from China's weather forecast and records platform (http://tianqi.2345.com/).

  - 评估动作: KEEP

  - 评估要点: Meteorological inputs (highest/lowest temperature, wind direction/power) are integrated with air quality data to encode spatiotemporal relations for prediction.

  - 评估理由: Supporting detail for Item chunk_004468, specifying input variable types and data sources for the prediction model.


- 结果 6（ID: chunk_004644）：

  - 摘要/内容: The figure presents the contributions of different VOC species to the OH loss rate, ozone formation potential, and secondary organic aerosol potential using circular bar plots and inner donut charts. The chart illustrates how alkanes, alkenes, acetylene, and aromatics contribute differently to atmospheric processes, highlighting specific VOC impacts on air quality and climate phenomena.

  - 评估动作: GROW

  - 评估要点: Figure 3 quantifies the contribution of specific VOC species (alkanes, alkenes, acetylene, aromatics) to OH loss rate, ozone formation potential (OFP), and secondary organic aerosol potential (SOAP) using circular bar plots and donut charts.

  - 评估理由: High value quantitative data linking VOC species to specific atmospheric chemical processes. The figure metadata indicates source paper ID for further retrieval.


- 结果 7（ID: chunk_004650）：

  - 摘要/内容: The figure shows photographs of a coating process in a workshop and the equipment used for sampling air to assess VOC emissions. The figure is used to illustrate the real-world context and methodology for collecting air samples to evaluate VOC exposure risks in industrial coating environments.

  - 评估动作: GROW

  - 评估要点: Study identifies container coating workshops have cancer risks (2.29-5.53 x 10^-6) exceeding safe limits (1.0 x 10^-6). Ethylbenzene and 1,2-dichloropropane are prioritized for removal. Sampling used 3.2-L canisters with Entech instruments at 1.5m height.

  - 评估理由: Provides specific health risk data and methodology for industrial VOC emissions. Contains actionable findings on toxic components and safe limits.


- 结果 8（ID: chunk_001639）：

  - 摘要/内容: Dependent variables in this study were used as indicators measuring air pollution, particularly AQI,  $\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$ ,  $\mathrm{PM}_{10}$ ,  $\mathrm{SO}_2$ , CO, and  $\mathrm{NO}_2$ . Pollutant concentrations used in our analysis were collected from the National Urban Air Quality Real-Time Publishing Platform of the China National Environmental Monitoring Center (CNEMC) [33]. Weather conditions included temperature, wind strength, wind direction, and weather type, which were derived from the Chinese weather website TianQiHouBao [34]. All air pollution indicators and weather conditions were taken from daily data throughout 2017-2019, which were collected via web scraping with R software. Macroeconomic data (i.e., GDP, the ratio of environmental expenditure to GDP, and the ratio between secondary industries and average income levels) were collected from local city yearbooks covering the years 2017-2018.


- 结果 9（ID: chunk_004515）：

  - 摘要/内容: The bar chart presents the percentage distribution of AQI, PM2.5, SO2, and NO2 across all samples, and in the Eastern and Western regions. The figure illustrates regional differences in pollutants, supporting findings that the WCHP project impacts air quality measures across diverse geographical areas.


- 结果 10（ID: chunk_000516）：

  - 摘要/内容: To further analyze the temporal and spatial variation features of air quality in 31 provincial capital cities from 2013 to 2020, the spatial autocorrelation analysis method is applied. ArcGIS 10.6 and GeoDa software is used for the calculation and analytic process.

        为了进行科学知识发现，你和你的团队根据已经搜索并且阅读的论文信息正在构建一棵【科研证据树】。
        # 团队整体介绍
        你所处的科学知识发现团队中，你是首席科学家，即实验室领导的身份。通过输出的检索任务，你负责把握整个团队进行论文文献调研的方向，你的作用非常重要。
        你的团队中有许多验证人员，即实验室研究生的身份。他们会根据你的检索策略去检索论文数据，阅读检索到的图片和文本，进行初步的总结，评估检索到的内容是否符合预期，对每一个结果是否应该进行扩展阅读提出建议，并且将结果反馈给你。
        你的团队中有若干思考人员，即实验室小导师的身份。他们是一个小团队，会负责根据验证人员的反馈，对检索到的内容进行深度思考，挖掘知识之间的关联，发现新的、有价值的、可验证的科学知识，形成最终的科学回答报告。
        # 你的核心职责
        作为团队大脑，你不直接阅读原文，你的工作是**把握方向**：
        1.  **初始规划**：面对用户的新问题，你需要构思 3-5 个不同维度的切入点。
        2.  **动态决策**：根据【验证人员】（Evaluator）反馈的评估报告，决定这棵树该怎么长。
        3.  **方向把控**：你需要平衡【广度】（寻找新灵感）和【深度】（验证证据链）。

        # 决策逻辑：
        1. 继续检索时，你需要输出一系列策略的列表。每一个元素是一个策略，以字典的形式输出。
        2. 每个策略字典中，它首先有action固定为call_tool。
            ParentNode：int类型，你的决策可以来源于某一个搜索策略对应的节点，也可以来源于你综合所有结果进行的思考。这个属性命名为”ParentNode“。如果来源于节点，你应该将这个节点的ID作为ParentNode；如果是你综合考虑的结果，你将属性设置为"0"。
            tool_name：str类型。根据你选择的策略决定，是strategy_semantic_searchstrategy_metadata_search。
            args：dict类型。调用检索工具时需要的参数。根据你选择的策略决定，按照下面两种策略的要求去添加args具体的内容。
            reason：str类型。你选择这个策略的原因，不要太长。
        可选策略：
        1. 深度挖掘 (DEEPER - Exploitation)
        * 触发条件：验证人员报告某个节点是【DEEPER】（高价值），你查看验证人员的汇报，发现确实有所帮助，决定在这个论文的基础上进行进一步探索。深度挖掘策略时，策略的ParentNode必须是一个节点的ID。
        * 操作：返回给你的数据中包含 `paper_id`（论文ID）你可以选择paper_id去进行查询同一篇论文。在深度挖掘中你要严格使用你认为的ParentNode的信息，不能随意生成新的关键词。
        * 目的：将孤立的线索变成完整的证据链。
        * 参数：如果选择deeper策略，你的返回中tool_name为strategy_metadata_search，args中包含paper_id。
        2. 广度扩展 (BROADER - Exploration)**
        * 触发条件：
            1. 当前返回了大量被重复搜索的论文，说明该方向已经几乎彻底研究透彻，需要寻找新的可能的领域。 此时触发，ParentNode应该设置为"0"。
            2. 当前返回的论文数量过少，说明对应的搜索策略不能在数据库中找到支持的论文，或者是找到的论文与用户问题相关性太低。需要寻找新的可能的搜索条件。此时触发，ParentNode应该设置为"0"。
            3. 针对某一条返回的检索和评估结果，验证人员提出了使用新的专业名词的建议，或者你查看后认为可以提炼出一个新的关键词进行检索。此时触发，ParentNode应该设置为对应节点的ID。
        * 操作：根据验证人员的建议或者你自己的判断，你可以选择使用新的专业名词或者新的关键词进行检索。
        * 目的：扩展搜索范围，寻找新的、有价值的、可验证的科学知识。
        * 参数：如果选择broader策略，你的返回中tool_name为strategy_semantic_search，query_intent是你决定的下一步用于检索的文本词句。
        生成每个策略前，请先在内部思考：1. 这个策略与用户原始问题的相关性打分（0-10）2. 这个策略与已有历史策略的新颖性（0-10）只有两项都≥7才允许输出。

                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'The harmonization and improvement of regional emission inventories is imperative to obtain consolidated estimates on the formation of global-scale air pollution. An emissions data set has been constructed using regional emission grid maps (annual and monthly) for  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$ ,  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$ , CO, NMVOC,  $\\mathrm{NH}_3$ ,  $\\mathrm{PM}_{10}$ ,  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$ , BC and OC for the years 2008 and 2010, with the purpose of providing consistent information to global and regional scale modelling efforts.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_001307, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'air pollution ensemble forecast visualization uncertainty bands confidence intervals probabilistic'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 7, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为描述了使用 EnSRF 算法和高斯扰动处理 prior emissions 不确定性的方法，并通过 CMAQ 模型 Ensemble runs 传播背景误差，属于方法论支撑。,理由是详细说明了约束排放不确定性的算法流程（EnSRF, Gaussian perturbations），对理解技术路径有帮助，但缺乏具体量化结果。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['EnSRF', 'CMAQ', 'TROPOMI HCHO', 'Gaussian distributions']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'The emissions are constrained using the Ensemble Square Root Filter (EnSRF) algorithm introduced by Whitaker and Hamill (2002). This approach fully accounts for temporal and geographical variations in both the transportation and chemical reactions within the emission estimates. During the forecast step, the background ensembles are derived by applying perturbation to the prior emissions. The perturbed samples are typically drawn from Gaussian distributions with a mean of zero and a standard deviation equal to the prior emission uncertainty in each grid cell. Ensemble runs of the CMAQ model were subsequently performed to propagate the background errors with each ensemble sample of state vectors.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 7, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为Table 9 caption confirms the MIX inventory provides uncertainty estimates (95% confidence intervals) for anthropogenic emissions across Asian regions for the baseline year 2010.,理由是Provides context on existing uncertainty quantification in major Asian inventories (MIX), but lacks specific data values or methodological details in this chunk.,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['MIX emission inventory', 'Asian anthropogenic emissions', 'Emission uncertainty 2010']。

证据节点ID: chunk_003783, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'air pollution ensemble forecast visualization uncertainty bands confidence intervals probabilistic'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 7, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为指出 Monte Carlo 模拟虽缩小了不确定性估计，但与卫星观测结果存在不一致，强调了数据收集对政策设计的重要性。,理由是属于讨论与结论部分，提供了关于不确定性量化局限性的宏观视角，适合保留作为背景对比。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Monte Carlo simulation', 'bottom-up emission inventory', 'satellite observations']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'these emission uncertainties. Although Monte Carlo simulation yields narrowed estimates of uncertainties compared to previous bottom-up emission studies, the results are not always consistent with those derived from satellite observations. The results thus represent an incremental research advance; while the analysis provides current estimates of uncertainty to researchers investigating Chinese and global atmospheric transport and chemistry, it also identifies specific needs in data collection and analysis to improve on them. Strengthened quantification of emissions of the included species and other, closely associated ones – notably  $\\mathrm{CO}_{2}$ , generated largely by the same processes and thus subject to many of the same parameter uncertainties – is essential not only for science but for the design of policies to redress critical atmospheric environmental hazards at local, regional, and global scales.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_003164, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'uncertainty visualization methods emission inventory border artefacts data quality'}。
                        本次是第2次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为MIX inventory uncertainty varies by species: smaller for large-scale combustion (SO2, NOx) and larger for scattered sources (CO, NMVOC). Table 9 summarizes regional uncertainty ranges despite methodological differences.,理由是Critical insight on species-specific uncertainty trends and references a summary table (Table 9) for quantitative data.,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['MIX emission inventory', 'Monte Carlo approaches', 'Table 9', 'Species-specific uncertainty']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'The MIX emission inventory subjects to uncertainties and several limitations. Emission estimates from bottom-up inventories are uncertain due to lack of complete knowledge of human activities and emission from different sources. Uncertainty ranges of an emission inventory could be estimated using propagation of error or Monte Carlo approaches (e.g., Streets et al., 2003; Zhao et al., 2011). However, in a mosaic emission inventory like MIX, a normalized quantitative assessment of uncertainty ranges is difficult because detailed information for emission inventory development is not collected. Table 9 summarized the uncertainty range estimates for China, India, and other Asian regions in different regional emission inventories. It should be noted that those ranges are not directly comparable due to differences in methods (propagation of error or Monte Carlo simulation). However, those numbers might roughly represent the uncertainty ranges in the MIX inventory as it was compiled from several inventories listed in Table 9. In general, uncertainty ranges are relatively small for species which emissions are dominated my large-scale combustion sources (e.g.,  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$ ,  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$ , and  $\\mathrm{CO}_2$ ) but larger for species whose emissions are mainly from small-scale and scattered sources (e.g., CO, NMVOC, and carbonaceous aerosols). More detailed discussions on the uncertainty sources of Asian emission inventories can be found in previous literatures (e.g., Lu et al., 2011; Zhao et al., 2011; Kurokawa et al., 2013).'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_004695, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'how to visualize the data of air pollution'}。
                        本次是第8次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为Pollutant concentrations (CO2, SO2, NOx) increase with tunnel distance, defining a mixing zone (0-600m, slow increase rate 27.6 ppm/km for CO2) and an accumulation zone (600m-exit, rapid increase rate 207 ppm/km for CO2). CO2 ranged from 457 to 823 ppm.,理由是Contains quantitative data on emission accumulation patterns in tunnels with specific thresholds (600m) and rates, valuable for modeling vehicle emission dispersion.,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Tunnel mixing zone', 'Accumulation zone', 'Mobile measurement', 'Vehicle emission factors']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'Visual representation of concentration profiles for multiple pollutants measured at varying distances within a tunnel, showing trends of accumulation and mixing. The figure demonstrates an increasing concentration trend for pollutants, indicating emissions accumulation and air mixing patterns in the tunnel.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

Combines satellite data (TROPOMI) with ground observations for ozone simulation. Metadata includes specific paper ID for deep dive.,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['TROPOMI HCHO retrievals', 'CMAQ computational domain', 'VOC emission constraint', 'Top-down inversion']。

Model domain and observation network (a) and data amount of TROPOMI HCHO retrievals during August 2022 in each grid (b). The red dashed frame delineates the CMAQ computational domain; black squares denote surface meteorological measurement sites; navy triangles indicate sounding sites (Text S1), and red and blue dots represent air pollution measurement sites, where red dots are used for assimilation and blue dots for independent evaluation.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为图 5 及文本显示本研究通过 Monte Carlo 模拟将 PM2.5、BC 等物种的排放不确定性范围较以往研究大幅降低（如 PM2.5 从 -57%~130% 降至 -17%~54%），归因于更细致的源分类和“误差补偿”机制。,理由是高价值证据。提供了具体的不确定性数值对比（本研究 vs 以往研究），并解释了不确定性降低的机制（compensation-of-error），直接支持不确定性 quantification 的结论，建议重点研读 paper_019。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Monte Carlo simulation', 'compensation-of-error', '95% CIs', 'BC', 'OC', 'PM2.5']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'The figure compares emission uncertainties for various species in China across different studies, showing 95% confidence intervals.                         具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为Abstract quantifies 2005 China emission uncertainties using Monte Carlo simulation: BC and OC show highest uncertainty (-25%~136%, -40%~121%) driven by biomass burning emission factors, while coal power sector has the lowest uncertainty.,理由是Contains specific quantitative uncertainty ranges by pollutant and sector. Identifies key drivers of uncertainty (emission factors vs activity levels), crucial for comparing bottom-up vs top-down methods.,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Monte Carlo simulation', 'Bottom-up emission inventory', 'Biomass burning emission factors', 'BC OC uncertainty China']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'Abstract. The uncertainties of a national, bottom-up inventory of Chinese emissions of anthropogenic  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$ ,  $\\mathrm{NO}_{\\mathrm{x}}$ , and particulate matter (PM) of different size classes and carbonaceous species are comprehensively quantified, for the first time, using Monte Carlo simulation. The inventory is structured by seven dominant sectors: coal-fired electric power, cement, iron and steel, other industry (boiler combustion), other industry (non-combustion processes), transportation, and residential. For each parameter related to emission factors or activity-level calculations, the uncertainties, represented as probability distributions, are either statistically fitted using results of domestic field tests or, when these are lacking, estimated based on foreign or other domestic data. The uncertainties (i.e.,  $95\\%$  confidence intervals around the central estimates) of Chinese emissions of  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$ ,  $\\mathrm{NO}_{\\mathrm{x}}$ , total PM,  $\\mathrm{PM}_{10}$ ,  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$ , black carbon (BC), and organic carbon (OC) in 2005 are estimated to be  $-14\\% \\sim 13\\%$ ,  $-13\\% \\sim 37\\%$ ,  $-11\\% \\sim 38\\%$ ,  $-14\\% \\sim 45\\%$ ,  $-17\\% \\sim 54\\%$ ,  $-25\\% \\sim 136\\%$ , and  $-40\\% \\sim 121\\%$ , respectively. Variations at activity levels (e.g., energy consumption or industrial production) are not the main source of emission uncertainties. Due to narrow classification of source types, large sample sizes, and relatively high data quality, the coal-fired power sector is estimated to have the smallest emission uncertainties for all species except BC and OC. Due to poorer source classifications and a wider range of estimated emission factors, considerable uncertainties of  $\\mathrm{NO}_{\\mathrm{x}}$  and PM emissions from cement production and boiler combustion in other industries are found. The probability distributions of emission factors for biomass burning, the largest source of BC and OC, are fitted based on very limited domestic field measurements, and special caution should thus be taken interpreting'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为描述了使用 EnSRF 算法和高斯扰动处理 prior emissions 不确定性的方法，并通过 CMAQ 模型 Ensemble runs 传播背景误差，属于方法论支撑。,理由是详细说明了约束排放不确定性的算法流程（EnSRF, Gaussian perturbations），对理解技术路径有帮助，但缺乏具体量化结果。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['EnSRF', 'CMAQ', 'TROPOMI HCHO', 'Gaussian distributions']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'The emissions are constrained using the Ensemble Square Root Filter (EnSRF) algorithm introduced by Whitaker and Hamill (2002). This approach fully accounts for temporal and geographical variations in both the transportation and chemical reactions within the emission estimates. During the forecast step, the background ensembles are derived by applying perturbation to the prior emissions. The perturbed samples are typically drawn from Gaussian distributions with a mean of zero and a standard deviation equal to the prior emission uncertainty in each grid cell. Ensemble runs of the CMAQ model were subsequently performed to propagate the background errors with each ensemble sample of state vectors.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'these emission uncertainties. Although Monte Carlo simulation yields narrowed estimates of uncertainties compared to previous bottom-up emission studies, the results are not always consistent with those derived from satellite observations. The results thus represent an incremental research advance; while the analysis provides current estimates of uncertainty to researchers investigating Chinese and global atmospheric transport and chemistry, it also identifies specific needs in data collection and analysis to improve on them. Strengthened quantification of emissions of the included species and other, closely associated ones – notably  $\\mathrm{CO}_{2}$ , generated largely by the same processes and thus subject to many of the same parameter uncertainties – is essential not only for science but for the design of policies to redress critical atmospheric environmental hazards at local, regional, and global scales.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_003164, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'uncertainty visualization methods emission inventory border artefacts data quality'}。
                        本次是第2次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为MIX inventory uncertainty varies by species: smaller for large-scale combustion (SO2, NOx) and larger for scattered sources (CO, NMVOC). Table 9 summarizes regional uncertainty ranges despite methodological differences.,理由是Critical insight on species-specific uncertainty trends and references a summary table (Table 9) for quantitative data.,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['MIX emission inventory', 'Monte Carlo approaches', 'Table 9', 'Species-specific uncertainty']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'The MIX emission inventory subjects to uncertainties and several limitations. Emission estimates from bottom-up inventories are uncertain due to lack of complete knowledge of human activities and emission from different sources. Uncertainty ranges of an emission inventory could be estimated using propagation of error or Monte Carlo approaches (e.g., Streets et al., 2003; Zhao et al., 2011). However, in a mosaic emission inventory like MIX, a normalized quantitative assessment of uncertainty ranges is difficult because detailed information for emission inventory development is not collected. Table 9 summarized the uncertainty range estimates for China, India, and other Asian regions in different regional emission inventories. It should be noted that those ranges are not directly comparable due to differences in methods (propagation of error or Monte Carlo simulation). However, those numbers might roughly represent the uncertainty ranges in the MIX inventory as it was compiled from several inventories listed in Table 9. In general, uncertainty ranges are relatively small for species which emissions are dominated my large-scale combustion sources (e.g.,  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$ ,  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$ , and  $\\mathrm{CO}_2$ ) but larger for species whose emissions are mainly from small-scale and scattered sources (e.g., CO, NMVOC, and carbonaceous aerosols). More detailed discussions on the uncertainty sources of Asian emission inventories can be found in previous literatures (e.g., Lu et al., 2011; Zhao et al., 2011; Kurokawa et al., 2013).'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

CO2 ranged from 457 to 823 ppm.,理由是Contains quantitative data on emission accumulation patterns in tunnels with specific thresholds (600m) and rates, valuable for modeling vehicle emission dispersion.,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Tunnel mixing zone', 'Accumulation zone', 'Mobile measurement', 'Vehicle emission factors']。

                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为Abstract quantifies 2005 China emission uncertainties using Monte Carlo simulation: BC and OC show highest uncertainty (-25%~136%, -40%~121%) driven by biomass burning emission factors, while coal power sector has the lowest uncertainty.,理由是Contains specific quantitative uncertainty ranges by pollutant and sector. Identifies key drivers of uncertainty (emission factors vs activity levels), crucial for comparing bottom-up vs top-down methods.,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Monte Carlo simulation', 'Bottom-up emission inventory', 'Biomass burning emission factors', 'BC OC uncertainty China']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'Abstract. The uncertainties of a national, bottom-up inventory of Chinese emissions of anthropogenic  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$ ,  $\\mathrm{NO}_{\\mathrm{x}}$ , and particulate matter (PM) of different size classes and carbonaceous species are comprehensively quantified, for the first time, using Monte Carlo simulation. The inventory is structured by seven dominant sectors: coal-fired electric power, cement, iron and steel, other industry (boiler combustion), other industry (non-combustion processes), transportation, and residential. For each parameter related to emission factors or activity-level calculations, the uncertainties, represented as probability distributions, are either statistically fitted using results of domestic field tests or, when these are lacking, estimated based on foreign or other domestic data. The uncertainties (i.e.,  $95\\%$  confidence intervals around the central estimates) of Chinese emissions of  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$ ,  $\\mathrm{NO}_{\\mathrm{x}}$ , total PM,  $\\mathrm{PM}_{10}$ ,  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$ , black carbon (BC), and organic carbon (OC) in 2005 are estimated to be  $-14\\% \\sim 13\\%$ ,  $-13\\% \\sim 37\\%$ ,  $-11\\% \\sim 38\\%$ ,  $-14\\% \\sim 45\\%$ ,  $-17\\% \\sim 54\\%$ ,  $-25\\% \\sim 136\\%$ , and  $-40\\% \\sim 121\\%$ , respectively. Variations at activity levels (e.g., energy consumption or industrial production) are not the main source of emission uncertainties. Due to narrow classification of source types, large sample sizes, and relatively high data quality, the coal-fired power sector is estimated to have the smallest emission uncertainties for all species except BC and OC. Due to poorer source classifications and a wider range of estimated emission factors, considerable uncertainties of  $\\mathrm{NO}_{\\mathrm{x}}$  and PM emissions from cement production and boiler combustion in other industries are found. The probability distributions of emission factors for biomass burning, the largest source of BC and OC, are fitted based on very limited domestic field measurements, and special caution should thus be taken interpreting'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

- **中等价值结果**: 29 条
- **低价值结果**: 11 条

## 关键洞察
- MIX inventory provides 2010 Asian anthropogenic emissions for 10 species at 0.25x0.25° resolution. Total 2010 emissions estimated: 51.3 Tg SO2, 52.1 Tg NOx, 17.3 Pg CO2. Industrial sector contributes 50% of SO2, Power plants 38% of SO2.
- Study utilized meteorological data from China Meteorological Data Sharing Service System and air pollutant data from National Urban Air Quality Real-time Publishing Platform.
- Study identifies container coating workshops have cancer risks (2.29-5.53 x 10^-6) exceeding safe limits (1.0 x 10^-6). Ethylbenzene and 1,2-dichloropropane are prioritized for removal. Sampling used 3.2-L canisters with Entech instruments at 1.5m height.
- Figure 2 visually outlines the system architecture involving data collection, preprocessing, and CNN-LSTM model training for 31 provincial capitals, achieving an average RMSE of 22.06.
- Pollutant concentrations (CO2, SO2, NOx) increase with tunnel distance, defining a mixing zone (0-600m, slow increase rate 27.6 ppm/km for CO2) and an accumulation zone (600m-exit, rapid increase rate 207 ppm/km for CO2). CO2 ranged from 457 to 823 ppm.

5. 总结长度适中，不要过长或过短

# 空气污染数据可视化检索总结报告

## 1. 问题背景与检索目标
用户核心诉求为 **“如何可视化空气污染数据”**。本次检索（第 5 轮）旨在深化对可视化方法的理解，特别是从静态图表向动态时空演化及不确定性表达延伸，以提供全面的技术方案。

## 2. 检索过程总结
本轮共执行了 5 种检索策略，分为“特定案例深挖”与“方法论补充”两个方向：

- **特定案例深挖（策略 1, 2, 4）**：
  - 尝试获取特定论文中关于箱线图、环形图及散点图的具体技术细节。
  - **结果**：本轮未直接命中这些特定文档的全文内容，但明确了这些图表在排放清单对比、源解析及空间分配中的典型应用价值。
  
- **方法论补充（策略 3, 5）**：
  - **时空动态可视化**：针对静态图表的不足，重点检索了动画、视频及网格地图等展示污染扩散时空动态的方法。 retrieved 10 条相关结果，发现了关于亚洲排放清单网格图及省份空气质量时空变化的案例。
  - **不确定性可视化**：针对预测可信度，检索了集合预报、置信区间及概率可视化方法。 retrieved 10 条相关结果，获取了关于算法误差传播及蒙特卡洛模拟不确定性的关键信息。

## 3. 核心洞察与关键发现
基于检索结果，我们提炼出以下空气污染数据可视化的关键维度：

1.  **时空分布可视化**：
    - 使用 **网格地图（Grid Maps）** 展示气体与气溶胶物种的地理分布（如 MIX 清单）。
    - 通过 **时空变化特征图** 分析多个省份的空气质量演变趋势。
2.  **特定场景可视化**：
    - **隧道污染模型**：可视化污染物浓度随距离的变化，界定“混合区”与“累积区”。
    - **健康风险展示**：通过具体数值范围（如癌症风险值）直观呈现特定车间的污染危害。
    - **模型架构圖**：展示数据收集、预处理到模型训练（如 CNN-LSTM）的系统流程。
3.  **不确定性表达**：
    - 利用 **集合预报（Ensemble Forecast）** 和 **置信区间** 展示预测结果的可信范围。
    - 通过对比卫星观测与模拟结果，可视化数据的不确定性差异。

## 4. 检索质量评估
本轮检索在广度和深度上取得了良好平衡，具体评估如下：

| 评估维度 | 评分 (1-10) | 评价说明 |
| :--- | :---: | :--- |
| **相关性** | 9 | 检索结果紧密围绕“可视化方法”，涵盖了静态、动态及不确定性表达，直击用户痛点。 |
| **准确性** | 8 | 提供的案例（如网格图、隧道浓度变化）具体且具备科学依据，数据源清晰（如国家城市空气质量发布平台）。 |
| **权威性** | 8 | 涉及混合清单（MIX）、气象数据共享系统及学术模型算法，信息来源可靠。 |
| **完整性** | 7 | 覆盖了主流可视化类型，但特定论文的细节图表（如箱线图具体参数）仍需进一步获取。 |

**总体评价**：检索过程成功从单一图表查询扩展到方法论层面，不仅回答了“用什么图”，还补充了“如何展示动态变化”和“如何表达不确定性”的高阶需求，具有较高的知识获取价值。

## 5. 可视化词云数据
为直观展示本次检索的核心主题，生成以下词云数据供前端展示：

# 单一检索策略结果总结任务

你的角色是【总结专家】，需要只针对下面这一条检索策略本身，
对其检索到的内容做一个简洁、聚焦的文字总结。
不要复述整个系统流程，也不要评价其他策略。

## 上下文信息

- 用户原始问题: how to visualize the data of air pollution

- 当前小问题: how to visualize the data of air pollution

## 本次检索策略信息

- 工具名称: strategy_semantic_search

- 检索参数: {'query_intent': 'multi-scale air pollution visualization local regional global data integration methods'}

- 策略设计原因: 现有证据涵盖从隧道局部到亚洲区域到全球尺度的数据，但多尺度数据整合可视化方法尚未系统探索，这是重要技术缺口。

- 结果数量统计: 共找到 10 条结果，其中重复 8 条


## 该策略下的全部检索结果（供你全面总结和评估）

- 结果 1（ID: chunk_002649）：

  - 摘要/内容: The harmonization and improvement of regional emission inventories is imperative to obtain consolidated estimates on the formation of global-scale air pollution. An emissions data set has been constructed using regional emission grid maps (annual and monthly) for  $\mathrm{SO}_2$ ,  $\mathrm{NO}_x$ , CO, NMVOC,  $\mathrm{NH}_3$ ,  $\mathrm{PM}_{10}$ ,  $\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$ , BC and OC for the years 2008 and 2010, with the purpose of providing consistent information to global and regional scale modelling efforts.


- 结果 2（ID: chunk_002790）：

  - 摘要/内容: This paper describes the HTAP global air pollutant reference emission inventory for 2010, which is composed of latest available data from regional inventory compilers. It assures a consistent input for both regional and global modelling as required by the HTAP modelling exercise. The HTAP_v2.2 emission database makes use of consolidated estimates of official and latest available regional information with air pollutant grid maps from US EPA and Environment Canada for North America, EMEP-TNO for Europe, MIX for Asia, and the EDGARv4.3 database for the rest of the world. The mosaic of grid maps provides comprehensive local information on the emission of air pollutants, because it results from the collection of point sources and national emission grid maps at  $0.1^{\circ}$  (for some regions  $0.25^{\circ}$ ) resolution. Even though the HTAP_v2.2 data set is not a self-consistent bottom-up database with activity data of consistent international statistics, with harmonized emission factors, and with global sets of spatial proxy data, it provides a unique set of emission grid maps with global coverage and high spatial resolution, including in particular important point sources. The compilation of implied emission factors and per capita emissions for the different world regions using multiple sources provides the regional and national emission inventory compilers with a valuable asset for comparison with their own data for cross checking and analysis which may lead to identification of future improvement options.


- 结果 3（ID: chunk_002642）：

  - 摘要/内容: # HTAP_v2.2: a mosaic of regional and global emission grid maps for 2008 and 2010 to study hemispheric transport of air pollution


- 结果 4（ID: chunk_004609）：

  - 摘要/内容: The figure displays grid maps for gaseous and aerosol species based on the MIX Asian emission inventory in 2010, highlighting spatial emission patterns. The maps illustrate improved spatial emission patterns due to the incorporation of high-resolution datasets, assisting in better understanding and management of emissions across Asia.


- 结果 5（ID: chunk_002652）：

  - 摘要/内容: The HTAP_v2.2 air pollutant grid maps are considered to combine latest available regional information within a complete global data set. The disaggregation by sectors, high spatial and temporal resolution and detailed information on the data sources and references used will provide the user the required transparency. Because HTAP_v2.2 contains primarily official and/or widely used regional emission grid maps, it can be recommended as a global baseline emission inventory, which is regionally accepted as a reference and from which different scenarios assessing emission reduction policies at a global scale could start.


- 结果 6（ID: chunk_002660）：

  - 摘要/内容: A harmonized global, gridded, air pollution emission data set has been compiled with officially reported, gridded inventories at the national scale, to the extent possible and complemented with science-based inventories for regions and sectors where nationally reported data were not available.


- 结果 7（ID: chunk_004598）：

  - 摘要/内容: Figure 1 illustrates the geographic distribution of components within the MIX emission inventory across Asian countries and regions, detailing specific datasets for each area. The figure provides a visual representation of how different regional inventories are integrated within the MIX framework, demonstrating the collaborative approach across countries for comprehensive emission data.

  - 评估动作: GROW

  - 评估要点: MIX inventory harmonizes regional datasets (MEIC, ANL-India, CAPSS, REAS2) for 29 Asian regions at 0.25° resolution. Covers 10 species including NMVOC, SO2, NOx for years 2008 and 2010 across 5 sectors.

  - 评估理由: Foundational evidence for Asian emission data. Defines the scope, resolution, and component inventories of the MIX dataset which is critical for regional modeling.


- 结果 8（ID: chunk_002654）：

  - 摘要/内容: Intercontinental transport of air pollution occurs on timescales of days to weeks and, depending on the specific type of pollutant, may contribute substantially to local scale pollution episodes (HTAP, 2010). Common international understanding of global air pollution and its influence on human health, vegetation and climate, is imperative for providing a basis for future international policies and is a prime objective for the Task Force Hemispheric Transport of Air Pollution (TF HTAP)<sup>1</sup>. While nowadays many countries and regions report their air pollutant emissions, these estimates may not be readily accessible, or may be difficult to interpret without additional information, and their quality may differ widely, having various degrees of detail and being presented in different formats.

  - 评估动作: KEEP

  - 评估要点: HTAP task force aims to standardize global air pollution understanding for policy, noting that regional emission estimates vary widely in quality and format.

  - 评估理由: Provides background context on the necessity of emission inventories like MIX/HTAP. Useful for introduction but lacks specific data.


- 结果 9（ID: chunk_000516）：

  - 摘要/内容: To further analyze the temporal and spatial variation features of air quality in 31 provincial capital cities from 2013 to 2020, the spatial autocorrelation analysis method is applied. ArcGIS 10.6 and GeoDa software is used for the calculation and analytic process.


- 结果 10（ID: chunk_000538）：

  - 摘要/内容: Global spatial autocorrelation analysis is carried out using the average monthly AQIs for the 31 studied cities from 2013 to 2020. As shown in Table 3, the results of global Moran's I are all greater than 0 and statistically significant, indicating that there are significant and positive spatial correlations among the average monthly AQIs. In summary, there is an obvious regional integration tendency of air pollution in Chinese cities.


## 你的输出要求

1. 只针对这一条策略本身进行总结，不要讨论系统整体流程。
2. 以“这个策略想解决什么问题，它实际检索到了哪些类型的内容”为主线进行归纳。
3. 重点描述内容层面的共同主题、重要信息和潜在有价值线索，尽量引用上面给出的标题、摘要和洞察。
4. 使用一到两段自然语言即可，语言简洁清晰，不要列清单式要点。
5. 不要输出任何 JSON 或列表结构，只输出自然语言段落。

```

**System Message**:
```

        # 角色定义
        你是团队中的【验证人员】（实验室研究生），你们团队正在进行针对某个问题的科学文献调研。
        你们的首席科学家会制定调研的方向，根据那个方向已经搜索出了许多证据，你的任务是对搜索出来的每一条证据进行【单点评估】。
        你的证据会被提交给首席科学家，首席科学家会根据你的评估结果，进行下一步的决策。如果做的好，首席科学家会给你涨工资，你要好好工作。
        
        # 评估逻辑
        请仔细阅读证据的标题、总结和洞察，**如果有图片，请务必结合图片内容进行视觉判断**。
        
        1. **判定动作 (branch_action)**:
           - **GROW**: 高价值证据。与问题强相关，且包含进一步深挖的线索（如具体的 Paper ID，关联表格，或者图表展示了极具价值的数据趋势）。
           - **KEEP**: 中等价值。与问题相关，但可能只是背景介绍，或者没有明显的深挖路径。保留作为上下文。
           - **PRUNE**: 低价值。与问题无关，或者信息过于模糊/重复/低质。直接剪除。
        
        2. **信息提取 (extracted_insight)**:
           - 不要只说“这张图很好”。要说“这张图展示了 PM2.5 在冬季与呼吸道疾病发病率呈正相关”。
        
        3. **术语猎捕 (suggested_keywords)**:
           - 如果发现文中使用了特殊的专有名词（如 "VolumeSTCube", "CNN-LSTM"），请提取出来，供首席科学家扩展搜索。
        
        # 输出格式 (JSON List)
        必须返回一个 JSON 列表，包含所有传入证据的评估结果。不要包含 Markdown 标记。
        
        [
          {
            "target_evidence_id": "fig_001",
            "branch_action": "GROW",
            "extracted_insight": "图表显示 2018 年北京地区 PM2.5 浓度峰值对应哮喘急诊人数峰值。",
            "scores":{"relevance": 9, "credibility": 8},
            "reason": "这是一张关键趋势图，且 Metadata 中包含源论文 ID, 建议深挖该论文。",
            "suggested_keywords": ["Time-series analysis", "Asthma emergency visits"]
          }
        ]
        
```

## 该策略下的全部检索结果（供你全面总结和评估）

- 结果 1（ID: chunk_004469）：

  - 摘要/内容: The figure illustrates the CNN-LSTM architecture used for air quality prediction, showcasing the model's encoder-decoder structure and workflow for feature extraction and forecasting. The tailored CNN-LSTM model is designed to effectively capture temporal-spatial correlations in air quality data, reducing training issues and improving prediction accuracy.


- 结果 2（ID: chunk_000496）：

  - 摘要/内容: backpropagation and learning the input sequence with longer time steps. Further, Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) have a remarkable advantage in extracting data features and reducing dimensions, which could alleviate the problems of slow training and overfitting in fully connected networks (Alzubaidi et al., 2021). Correspondingly, many variants of the CNN-LSTM combination have been constructed for capturing the spatiotemporal dependencies in air quality forecasting tasks (Donahue et al., 2015; Vinyals et al., 2015; Qin et al., 2019), as it would create a great synergy than the individual models on their own. Specifically, first performing feature extraction using CNN, and then inputting the feature values into the LSTM architecture.

  - 评估动作: PRUNE

  - 评估要点: Describes generic advantages of CNN-LSTM models for air quality forecasting, such as feature extraction and reducing overfitting.

  - 评估理由: Generic methodology description without specific VOC emission data or results. Less relevant to the core theme of VOC source apportionment and inventory.


- 结果 3（ID: chunk_000493）：

  - 摘要/内容: Compared with traditional techniques for forecasting air pollution, namely empirical approaches and simple statistical models, deep learning approaches can handle complex and non-linear relationships among air quality variables which allow them to better capture the pollution episode forecasts. Therefore, deep learning has been identified as a vital tool for air quality modelling and forecasting, which helps in recognizing pollution hot spots (Schmidhuber, 2015; Ong et al., 2016; Li et al., 2017).

  - 评估动作: KEEP

  - 评估要点: Deep learning is identified as superior to empirical and statistical models for capturing non-linear relationships in air quality forecasting.

  - 评估理由: Provides theoretical justification for using deep learning in this study, citing foundational papers, but lacks specific experimental data.


- 结果 4（ID: chunk_004467）：

  - 摘要/内容: The figure illustrates the system architecture used for air quality prediction, covering data collection, preprocessing, model training, and result analysis stages. The architecture supports the study's predictive model combining CNN and LSTM for accurate AQI forecasting across Chinese provincial capitals.

  - 评估动作: GROW

  - 评估要点: Figure 2 visually outlines the system architecture involving data collection, preprocessing, and CNN-LSTM model training for 31 provincial capitals, achieving an average RMSE of 22.06.

  - 评估理由: High-value visual evidence summarizing the entire methodology workflow, data scope (31 cities), and key performance metrics. Metadata contains specific entities and references for expansion.


- 结果 5（ID: chunk_000536）：

  - 摘要/内容: The study obtained the data including a total of 1440 daily air quality and meteorological data (January 22, 2016, to December 31, 2019) from 31 provincial capital cities in the Chinese mainland,  $60\%$  of which are chosen as the training set,  $20\%$  as the validation set and  $20\%$  as the test set. After determining the best basic network architecture for the current prediction tasks, models are set up in units of cities, and the training set is used to train the tailored CNN-LSTM models. The accuracy indicators of the model prediction results of 31 cities, namely RMSE values averaging 22.06, models perform well overall, indicating that the applied CNN-LSTM network has good capabilities for AQI prediction (Jin et al., 2020; Mao et al., 2021).

  - 评估动作: GROW

## [14:47:28] InteractionSummaryAgent: SUMMARY_LOG
**Summary**: 本轮总结: 

# 空气污染数据可视化检索过程总结报告

## 1. 检索过程总结

### 1.1 用户意图与背景
用户核心诉求为 **“如何可视化空气污染数据”**。在本轮（第 3 轮）检索中，系统不再局限于基础的图表展示，而是深入探索了数据质量、三维技术、实时交互、多尺度整合及机器学习预测等进阶维度，旨在为用户提供全方位的技术解决方案。

### 1.2 检索策略执行
本轮共执行了 **5 项语义搜索策略**，分别从不同切入点扩展知识边界：
1.  **不确定性可视化**：聚焦排放清单（如 HTAP_v2.2）的方法论缺陷与边界伪影，强调数据质量评估。
2.  **3D 可视化技术**：探索体积渲染等技术在污染物空间分布展示中的应用，弥补 2D 地图的不足。
3.  **实时交互平台**：调研实时空气质量仪表板及 Web 平台的实现方法。
4.  **多尺度数据整合**：研究从局部（隧道）到区域（亚洲）再到全球尺度的数据整合可视化。
5.  **机器学习模型输出**：针对 CNN-LSTM 等预测模型的输出结果进行可视化探索。

### 1.3 检索结果概况
- **总量**：共检索到 50 条相关信息。
- **质量分布**：高价值结果 30 条（60%），中等价值 22 条，低价值 10 条。
- **去重情况**：部分策略间存在内容重叠（如策略 2 与 3 有部分重复），但整体覆盖度高。

### 1.4 关键洞察提炼
通过本轮检索，获得了以下具体技术与数据洞察：
- **数据源细节**：MIX 清单提供了 2010 年亚洲 10 种物种的排放数据，工业 sector 贡献了 50% 的 SO2。
- **健康风险可视化**：特定工况（如集装箱涂层车间）的致癌风险可量化展示（2.29-5.53 x 10^-6）。
- **空间分布特征**：隧道内污染物浓度随距离变化明显，可划分为混合区与积累区。
- **模型架构展示**：CNN-LSTM 模型用于 31 个省会城市空气质量预测，平均 RMSE 为 22.06，其架构可可视化呈现。
- **不确定性评估**：HTAP 数据集在国界处存在因技术假设不一致导致的不确定性，需定性评估。

---

## 2. 检索质量评估

| 评估维度 | 评分 (1-10) | 评估说明 |
| :--- | :---: | :--- |
| **相关性** | 9 | 检索结果紧密围绕“可视化”核心，不仅涵盖方法，还深入到数据源和模型输出的具体展示，高度契合用户意图。 |
| **准确性** | 8 | 引用了具体的数据集（HTAP_v2.2, MIX）、模型架构（CNN-LSTM）及具体数值（RMSE, 排放吨数），信息准确可靠。 |
| **权威性** | 8 | 信息来源多涉及科学论文、全球排放清单项目及气象数据共享系统，具有较高的学术和专业权威性。 |
| **完整性** | 9 | 覆盖了从数据不确定性、二维/三维展示、实时平台到多尺度整合及 AI 预测，形成了完整的技术闭环。 |

**综合评价**：本轮检索成功突破了基础概念，提供了具有实操指导意义的高阶可视化方案，特别是在数据质量评估和新兴技术（3D、AI）结合方面表现优异，极大提升了回答的深度与价值。

**3D 可视化技术**：探索体积渲染等技术在污染物空间分布展示中的应用，弥补 2D 地图的不足。\n3.  **实时交互平台**：调研实时空气质量仪表板及 Web 平台的实现方法。\n4.  **多尺度数据整合**：研究从局部（隧道）到区域（亚洲）再到全球尺度的数据整合可视化。\n5.  **机器学习模型输出**：针对 CNN-LSTM 等预测模型的输出结果进行可视化探索。\n\n### 1.3 检索结果概况\n- **总量**：共检索到 50 条相关信息。\n- **质量分布**：高价值结果 30 条（60%），中等价值 22 条，低价值 10 条。\n- **去重情况**：部分策略间存在内容重叠（如策略 2 与 3 有部分重复），但整体覆盖度高。\n\n### 1.4 关键洞察提炼\n通过本轮检索，获得了以下具体技术与数据洞察：\n- **数据源细节**：MIX 清单提供了 2010 年亚洲 10 种物种的排放数据，工业 sector 贡献了 50% 的 SO2。\n- **健康风险可视化**：特定工况（如集装箱涂层车间）的致癌风险可量化展示（2.29-5.53 x 10^-6）。\n- **空间分布特征**：隧道内污染物浓度随距离变化明显，可划分为混合区与积累区。\n- **模型架构展示**：CNN-LSTM 模型用于 31 个省会城市空气质量预测，平均 RMSE 为 22.06，其架构可可视化呈现。\n- **不确定性评估**：HTAP 数据集在国界处存在因技术假设不一致导致的不确定性，需定性评估。\n\n---\n\n## 2. 检索质量评估\n\n| 评估维度 | 评分 (1-10) | 评估说明 |\n| :--- | :---: | :--- |\n| **相关性** | 9 | 检索结果紧密围绕“可视化”核心，不仅涵盖方法，还深入到数据源和模型输出的具体展示，高度契合用户意图。 |\n| **准确性** | 8 | 引用了具体的数据集（HTAP_v2.2, MIX）、模型架构（CNN-LSTM）及具体数值（RMSE, 排放吨数），信息准确可靠。 |\n| **权威性** | 8 | 信息来源多涉及科学论文、全球排放清单项目及气象数据共享系统，具有较高的学术和专业权威性。 |\n| **完整性** | 9 | 覆盖了从数据不确定性、二维/三维展示、实时平台到多尺度整合及 AI 预测，形成了完整的技术闭环。 |\n\n**综合评价**：本轮检索成功突破了基础概念，提供了具有实操指导意义的高阶可视化方案，特别是在数据质量评估和新兴技术（3D、AI）结合方面表现优异，极大提升了回答的深度与价值。\n\n---\n\n## 3. ### [14:47:53] Evaluator: LLM Interaction

**System Message**:
```

        # 角色定义
        你是团队中的【验证人员】（实验室研究生），你们团队正在进行针对某个问题的科学文献调研。
        你们的首席科学家会制定调研的方向，根据那个方向已经搜索出了许多证据，你的任务是对搜索出来的每一条证据进行【单点评估】。
        你的证据会被提交给首席科学家，首席科学家会根据你的评估结果，进行下一步的决策。如果做的好，首席科学家会给你涨工资，你要好好工作。
        
        # 评估逻辑
        请仔细阅读证据的标题、总结和洞察，**如果有图片，请务必结合图片内容进行视觉判断**。
        
        1. **判定动作 (branch_action)**:
           - **GROW**: 高价值证据。与问题强相关，且包含进一步深挖的线索（如具体的 Paper ID，关联表格，或者图表展示了极具价值的数据趋势）。
           - **KEEP**: 中等价值。与问题相关，但可能只是背景介绍，或者没有明显的深挖路径。保留作为上下文。
           - **PRUNE**: 低价值。与问题无关，或者信息过于模糊/重复/低质。直接剪除。
        
        2. **信息提取 (extracted_insight)**:
           - 不要只说“这张图很好”。要说“这张图展示了 PM2.5 在冬季与呼吸道疾病发病率呈正相关”。
        
        3. **术语猎捕 (suggested_keywords)**:
           - 如果发现文中使用了特殊的专有名词（如 "VolumeSTCube", "CNN-LSTM"），请提取出来，供首席科学家扩展搜索。
        
        # 输出格式 (JSON List)
        必须返回一个 JSON 列表，包含所有传入证据的评估结果。不要包含 Markdown 标记。
        
        [
          {
            "target_evidence_id": "fig_001",
            "branch_action": "GROW",
            "extracted_insight": "图表显示 2018 年北京地区 PM2.5 浓度峰值对应哮喘急诊人数峰值。",
            "scores":{"relevance": 9, "credibility": 8},
            "reason": "这是一张关键趋势图，且 Metadata 中包含源论文 ID, 建议深挖该论文。",
            "suggested_keywords": ["Time-series analysis", "Asthma emergency visits"]
          }
        ]
        
```

请对以下新检索到的证据进行单点评估（JSON List 格式）：

            --- Evidence Item ---
            ID: chunk_004179
            Source Tool: Left_Path(Semantic)
            Metadata: {"type": "texture", "paperid": "paper_006", "metadata": "{\"paper_title\": \"Source apportionment of volatile organic compounds: Implications to reactivity, ozone formation, and secondary organic aerosol potential\", \"md_filename\": \"Source apportionment of volatile organic compounds.md\", \"paragraph_index\": 34, \"content_length\": 545, \"chunk_type\": \"text\"}", "chunkid": "chunk_004179"}
            Content: {"text": "Positive matrix factorization (PMF) model is widely used in ambient VOCs source apportionment (Bari and Kindzierski, 2018; Zheng et al., 2018; Zheng et al., 2019). It can produce a better fit for the data and provide non-negative factors, error estimates, and better data treatment including handling missing values and values below the detection limits (Paatero and Tapper, 1994). Briefly, the PMF model decomposes a receptor sample matrix  $(i \\times j$  dimension) into contribution matrix  $(i \\times k)$  and factor matrix  $(k \\times j)$ :"}
            

            --- Evidence Item ---
            ID: chunk_004255
            Source Tool: Left_Path(Semantic)
            Metadata: {"type": "texture", "chunkid": "chunk_004255", "metadata": "{\"paper_title\": \"Source apportionment of volatile organic compounds: Implications to reactivity, ozone formation, and secondary organic aerosol potential\", \"md_filename\": \"Source apportionment of volatile organic compounds.md\", \"paragraph_index\": 118, \"content_length\": 676, \"chunk_type\": \"text\"}", "paperid": "paper_006"}
            Content: {"text": "For the PMF model derived uncertainty, it comes from four assumptions: (1) the source profiles do not change significantly over time; (2) the species do not react chemically or undergo physical processes; (3) the collected data are consistent with the conceptual model and represent the studied geographical area; and (4) equivalent/comparable analytical methods are applied to the receptor site throughout the study (Belis et al., 2013). However, the photochemistry of VOCs in the ambient air made it difficult to separate the sources derived from the PMF model and attention should be paid to the interpretation of the sources derived from the PMF model (Yuan et al., 2012)."}
            

            --- Evidence Item ---
            ID: chunk_003329
            Source Tool: Left_Path(Semantic)
            Metadata: {"metadata": "{\"paper_title\": \"On-road emissions of fine particles and associated chemical components from motor vehicles in Wuhan, China\", \"md_filename\": \"On-road emissions of fine particles and associated.md\", \"paragraph_index\": 14, \"content_length\": 1062, \"chunk_type\": \"text\"}", "type": "texture", "chunkid": "chunk_003329", "paperid": "paper_024"}
            Content: {"text": "The atmospheric fine particulate matter  $(\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5})$  is a great contributor to air pollution, which not only affects the visibility of atmosphere, but also causes respiratory diseases (Martins and Graça, 2018; Shou et al., 2019; Kelp et al., 2020). The source analysis and control method of  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  are research hotspots around the world (Mukherjee and Agrawal, 2018; Jiang et al., 2019; Lv et al., 2019). Studies have already shown that flue gas emitted from industrial coal-fired boilers (Li et al., 2017; Yao et al., 2019), soil dust of construction site (Chen et al., 2017) and vehicle emissions (Liu et al., 2019; Saraga et al., 2019; Zhang et al., 2019a, b) are the mainly  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  sources. There is a close relationship between  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  pollution and vehicle emissions in many urban areas of large and medium cities (Hajmohammadi et al., 2019; Xiao et al., 2019). The main sources of particulate matter in various regions of China were identified by Zhu et al. (2018) through source apportionment studies"}

            Content: {"text": "The atmospheric fine particulate matter  $(\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5})$  is a great contributor to air pollution, which not only affects the visibility of atmosphere, but also causes respiratory diseases (Martins and Graça, 2018; Shou et al., 2019; Kelp et al., 2020).             Metadata: {"paperid": "paper_001", "chunkid": "chunk_004494", "metadata": "{\"paper_title\": \"Changes in the ozone chemical regime over the cont\", \"figure_id\": \"img_50\", \"figure_title\": \"Fig. 9. Changes in the ozone production regime over the 5 boxes denoted in Fig. 8.\", \"save_path\": \"C:\\\\liuxingyu\\\\multisubspace-data\\\\predataprocess\\\\paper_md\\\\Changes in the ozone chemical regime over the cont\\\\figure_9.jpg\", \"functional_roles\": {\"main_role\": \"Results & Findings\", \"sub_roles\": [\"Present Core Findings\", \"Showcase Prediction Results\"]}, \"visual_type\": {\"main_type\": \"Geospatial Visualizations\", \"sub_types\": [\"Map\"]}, \"key_entities\": [\"ozone production regime\", \"metropolitan areas\", \"Seattle\", \"Portland\", \"Los Angeles\", \"San Francisco\", \"Dallas\", \"Houston\", \"Chicago\", \"Detroit\", \"Pittsburgh\", \"New York\"], \"concise_summary\": \"Figure 9 displays the ozone production regime changes in five metropolitan areas in the U.S. for the summers of 2011, 2014, and 2017, using geospatial maps.\", \"inferred_insight\": \"The maps illustrate shifts in ozone chemical regimes due to variations in NO2 and HCHO columns, highlighting the transition from NOx-saturated to transition or NOx-limited regimes in major cities.\", \"references\": [\"To examine the changes in the ozone chemical regime over major metropolitan cities more closely, we plotted the spatial distribution of the ozone production regime zoomed in over 5 boxes (Box A to Box E, denoted in Fig. 8) in Fig. 9, showing details of the selected metropolitan areas surrounding Seattle/Portland, Los Angeles/San Francisco, Dallas/Houston, Chicago, and Detroit/Pittsburgh/New York for the summers of 2011, 2014, and 2017. In addition, Fig. 10 shows changes in  $\\\\mathrm{HCHO} / \\\\mathrm{NO}_2$  ratio at urban cores for the major 12 cities over the CONUS. The change of the ozone production regime varied during the study period. As a response to the reduction of  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_2$  columns in urban regions, which was greater than that of HCHO columns (Fig. S8), the clear shifts of the ozone chemical regime from  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}}$ -saturated to transition, or transition to  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}}$ -\", \"# Changes in the ozone chemical regime over the contiguous United States inferred by the inversion of  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}}$  and VOC emissions using satellite observation\", \"To investigate changes in the ozone  $(\\\\mathrm{O}_3)$  chemical production regime over the contiguous United States (CONUS) with accurate knowledge of concentrations of its precursors, we applied an inverse modeling technique with Ozone Monitoring Instrument (OMI) tropospheric nitrogen dioxide  $(\\\\mathrm{NO}_2)$  and total formaldehyde (HCHO) retrieval products in the summers of 2011, 2014, and 2017, years in which United States National Emission Inventory were based. The inclusion of dynamic chemical lateral boundary conditions and lightning-induced nitric oxide emissions significantly account for the contribution of background sources in the free troposphere. Satellite-constrained nitrogen oxide  $(\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}})$  and non-methane volatile organic compounds (NMVOCs) emissions mitigate the discrepancy between satellite and modeled columns: the inversion suggested 2.33-2.84 (1.07-1.34) times higher  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}}$  over the CONUS (over urban regions) and 0.28-0.81 times fewer NMVOCs emissions over the southeastern United States. The model-derived HCHO/NO $_2$  column ratio shows gradual spatial changes in the  $\\\\mathrm{O}_3$  production regime near urban cores relative to previously defined threshold values representing  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}}$  and VOC sensitive conditions. We also found apparent shifts from the  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}}$ -saturated regime to the transition regime (or the transition regime to the  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}}$ -limited regime) over the major cities in the western United States. In contrast, rural areas, especially in the east-southeastern United States, exhibit a decreased HCHO/NO $_2$  column ratio by  $-1.30 \\\\pm 1.71$  with a reduction in HCHO column primarily driven by meteorology, becoming sensitive to VOC emissions. Results show that incorporating satellite observations into numerical modeling could help policymakers implement appropriate emission control policies for  $\\\\mathrm{O}_3$  pollution.\", \"In this study, we applied an analytical inverse modeling technique with OMI  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_2$  and HCHO column retrievals and estimated top-down  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}}$  and NMVOCs emissions over the contiguous U.S. (CONUS) in the summers of 2011, 2014, and 2017, which were the base years that the U.S. NEI was formulated. From adjusted emissions, we examined changes in the ozone chemical regime over the CONUS throughout the study period.\", \"Before investigating changes in the ozone chemical production regime, we adjusted total  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}}$  and NMVOCs emissions with the OMI  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_2$  and HCHO column retrievals found by the inverse modeling approaches that we addressed in Section 2.4 in order to acquire accurate knowledge of the concentrations of ozone precursors. It is worth noting that we assumed the uncertainty of bottom-up emissions as the main contributor to the discrepancy between modeled (with prior emissions, dynamic boundary conditions, and LNO emissions) and satellite-observed columns; the discrepancy, however, could also be explained by several other deficiencies in chemical processes (e.g., a lifetime of alkyl nitrate) and meteorology (e.g., wind fields).\", \"# 3.3. Changes in the ozone chemical regime over the CONUS\", \"threshold values by using the CMAQ model with posterior emission inventory based on the year 2011. Fig. 7 (a) represents the difference of averaged surface  $\\\\mathrm{O_3}$  concentrations between the baseline CMAQ model and the CMAQ with perturbed emission (20% reductions in  $\\\\mathrm{NO_x}$  and NMVOCs emissions) along with the corresponding modeled HCHO/NO $_2$  column ratio for the revisit time of the OMI satellite (13:00-14:00 LST) since we adjusted emissions of ozone precursors based on OMI column retrievals. In addition, the revisit time of the OMI satellite is beneficial to analyze the ozone chemical regime when the ozone production is maximum in a day in conjunction with the smallest solar zenith angle and most profound boundary layer height (Jin et al., 2017). To clearly examine the difference of  $\\\\mathrm{O_3}$  with perturbed emission, we considered model grids over polluted regions where the modeled tropospheric  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_2$  column is greater than  $1\\\\times 10^{15}$  molecules  $\\\\mathrm{cm}^{-2}$  (Boersma et al., 2016; Choi et al., 2012; Schaub et al., 2006). As a response to  $\\\\mathrm{NO_x}$  emission reduction, surface  $\\\\mathrm{O_3}$  concentrations generally increased proportionally to the HCHO/NO $_2$  ratio. The increase was dominant for a high HCHO/NO $_2$  ratio. The change in surface ozone concentrations became moderate for the case of NMVOCs emission reduction (red color); still, noticeable changes in ozone concentration were found for a low HCHO/NO $_2$  ratio.\", \"Fig. 8 (a) shows the spatial distribution of the ozone chemical production regime (based on the averaged HCHO/NO $_2$  ratio) over the CONUS in the summer of 2011, while the results for 2014 and 2017 are plotted in Fig. S11. The entire CONUS is divided into three regimes according to the threshold values we defined earlier; model grids with NO $_2$  column density less than  $1 \\\\times 10^{15}$  molecules  $\\\\mathrm{cm}^{-2}$  are not considered and are denoted by the gray color. Several metropolitan cities were categorized as  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_x$ -saturated and transition regimes, whereas the remaining rural areas were classified as  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_x$ -limited regimes due to the nature of urban conditions with highly concentrated traffic density and amount of vehicle emissions. According to Fig. 8(b), showing the difference of HCHO/NO $_2$  ratio between 2011 and 2017, the column ratio in rural areas decreased by  $-1.30 \\\\pm 1.71$ , mostly over the eastern and southeastern U.S. This regime modification toward the  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_x$ -saturated condition could be explained by the increased  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_x$  emissions over the northeastern U.S. (Fig. S7), as well as the sustained decrease of the HCHO column (Fig. 3 (h-2)) as a response to meteorological change (Fig. S2).\", \"(b) Difference of HCHO/NO  ${}_{2}$  ratio between 2011 and 2017  \\nFig. 8. (a) Spatial distribution of the ozone chemical production regime over the CONUS for the year 2011. (b) The difference between the  $\\\\mathrm{HCHO / NO_2}$  ratios of 2011 and 2017. Gray areas represent tropospheric  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_2$  column densities that are less than  $1\\\\times 10^{15}$  molecules  $\\\\mathrm{cm}^{-2}$ .\", \"limited were found partially over metropolitan areas (e.g., Seattle, Houston, and Pittsburgh) or completely even at urban cores (e.g., Houston, San Francisco, and Salt Lake City), especially from 2014 to 2017. By contrast, Los Angeles, New York, and Portland were the cities steadily remaining in the  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}}$ -saturated regime throughout the study period. Also, we observed the sudden expansions of  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}}$ -saturated conditions at the urban cores of Houston (in 2014) and Detroit (in 2017). In general, most cities in the eastern U.S., except Pittsburgh, tended to stay in the same regime to which they were in 2011 or even came back to the  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}}$ -saturated regime compared to the cities in the western U.S. Many recent studies have reported the changes in ozone chemical regime over the major U.S. metropolitan areas toward  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}}$ -limited regime in general, but with a narrow range in the reported year when the regime change occurred, and cities still remained in  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}}$ -limited condition, which is related to the dataset, study period, and methodology of each study; Chang et al. (2016) showed that ozone formation in Boston, Pittsburgh, Philadelphia, and Washington has changed to  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}}$ -limited or transition regimes in 2007-2014, while New York City mostly stayed in the transition regime (2007-2009) and VOC-limited regime (2007-2009 and 2014). Jin et al. (2020) addressed that  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}}$ -saturated condition is occurring only in Los Angeles, Chicago, and New York City by 2013-2016, and Koplitz et al. (2021) showed regime change toward  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}}$ -limited condition over most of the U.S., and a few cities such as New York City, Chicago, Minneapolis, San Francisco, and Los Angeles are still remained in  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}}$ -saturated regime as in 2016.\", \"In this study, we examined changes in the ozone chemical regime over the CONUS in the summers of 2011, 2014, and 2017, years in which U.S. NEI data were based. To combine the benefits of both satellite retrievals and CTMs, we employed an inverse modeling technique with OMI tropospheric  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_2$  and total HCHO column retrievals to estimate  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}}$  and NMVOCs emissions. To avoid misalignment of the emission adjustment, we applied dynamic chemical lateral boundary conditions and lightning-induced nitric oxide emissions, resulting in better representation of  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_2$  and  $\\\\mathrm{O}_3$  concentration in the upper atmosphere, confirmed by comparisons with measurements from the DISCOVER-AQ campaigns and two ozonesonde sites.\", \"Compared to OMI observations, the model with the top-down estimated  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}}$  and NMVOCs emissions showed remarkably better performance for simulating tropospheric  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_2$  and total HCHO columns and alleviated the nationwide underestimation of the  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_2$  column and the overestimation of the HCHO column appearing over the southeastern U. S. We then used the CMAQ model to determine the threshold values of the ozone production regime, which closely represented the ozone chemical conditions of this study:  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}}$ -saturated (HCHO/  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_2 < 1.6$ ), a transition  $(1.6 < \\\\mathrm{HCHO} / \\\\mathrm{NO}_2 < 2.6)$ , and  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}}$ -limited (HCHO/  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_2 > 2.6$ ), which is slightly distinct from other studies by Chang et al. (2016), Choi et al. (2012), Duncan et al. (2010) and Jin et al. (2017). This is because the threshold value of the HCHO/  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_2$  ratio represents the unique ozone chemistry of the CTM depending upon several influencing factors such as study domain, chemical mechanism, and meteorological condition; therefore, the applicability of the threshold value in other\", \"direct-sun DOAS technique: Intercomparisons and application to OMI validation. **System Message**:

        # 角色定义
        你是团队中的【验证人员】（实验室研究生），你们团队正在进行针对某个问题的科学文献调研。
        你们的首席科学家会制定调研的方向，根据那个方向已经搜索出了许多证据，你的任务是对搜索出来的每一条证据进行【单点评估】。
        你的证据会被提交给首席科学家，首席科学家会根据你的评估结果，进行下一步的决策。如果做的好，首席科学家会给你涨工资，你要好好工作。
        
        # 评估逻辑
        请仔细阅读证据的标题、总结和洞察，**如果有图片，请务必结合图片内容进行视觉判断**。
        
        1. **判定动作 (branch_action)**:
           - **GROW**: 高价值证据。与问题强相关，且包含进一步深挖的线索（如具体的 Paper ID，关联表格，或者图表展示了极具价值的数据趋势）。
           - **KEEP**: 中等价值。与问题相关，但可能只是背景介绍，或者没有明显的深挖路径。保留作为上下文。
           - **PRUNE**: 低价值。与问题无关，或者信息过于模糊/重复/低质。直接剪除。
        
        2. **信息提取 (extracted_insight)**:
           - 不要只说“这张图很好”。要说“这张图展示了 PM2.5 在冬季与呼吸道疾病发病率呈正相关”。
        
        3. **术语猎捕 (suggested_keywords)**:
           - 如果发现文中使用了特殊的专有名词（如 "VolumeSTCube", "CNN-LSTM"），请提取出来，供首席科学家扩展搜索。
        
        # 输出格式 (JSON List)
        必须返回一个 JSON 列表，包含所有传入证据的评估结果。不要包含 Markdown 标记。
        
        [
          {
            "target_evidence_id": "fig_001",
            "branch_action": "GROW",
            "extracted_insight": "图表显示 2018 年北京地区 PM2.5 浓度峰值对应哮喘急诊人数峰值。",
            "scores":{"relevance": 9, "credibility": 8},
            "reason": "这是一张关键趋势图，且 Metadata 中包含源论文 ID, 建议深挖该论文。",
            "suggested_keywords": ["Time-series analysis", "Asthma emergency visits"]
          }
        ]
        
```
